homepageEditor.title: Homepage Template Management
homepageEditor.pageDescription: Manage multiple static HTML homepage templates from the admin. You can save drafts, preview sanitized output, and publish one as the current storefront homepage.
homepageEditor.empty: No homepage templates in the database yet. Create a draft first.
homepageEditor.legacyNotice: This record uses the legacy structured homepage format. Saving will convert it to static HTML template mode.
homepageEditor.activeNotice: This template is currently active and cannot be deleted. Publish another template first.
homepageEditor.htmlDescription: Paste externally crafted static HTML snippets. The system will strip script tags, style tags, and dangerous attributes, rendering only safe content.
homepageEditor.cssDescription: It is recommended that external templates use .cms-homepage as the root class name to reduce the risk of style pollution on the storefront.
homepageEditor.htmlSanitized: HTML contains dangerous content; preview has been automatically sanitized
homepageEditor.cssSanitized: CSS contains unsafe rules; preview has been automatically sanitized
homepageEditor.previewEmpty: The preview area renders the sanitized HTML template. The current template is empty or has no displayable content after sanitization.

toast.selectFirst: Please select or create a homepage template first
toast.htmlRequired: Usable HTML template is required before publishing
toast.published: Published as the current active homepage
toast.cannotDeleteActive: Cannot delete the active template. Publish another template first.

homepageEditor.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete template "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.

courseEditor.title: Course Management
courseEditor.empty: No courses yet. Click the button above to create one.

form.thumbnailHint: Only file metadata is shown after upload. The permanent S3 URL stays hidden.
form.productHint: Once linked, course_id will be written to the product's metadata automatically.
form.productReadonlyHint: Product link is managed from the product's virtual config and is read-only here.
form.noProductLinked: No product linked. Go to the product's virtual config and select this course to link it.

toast.confirmDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete course "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.

lessonEditor.title: Lesson Title
lessonEditor.mediaHint: Only file metadata is shown after upload. The permanent S3 URL stays hidden.
lessonEditor.autoUploadAfterCreate: Selected files will be uploaded automatically after the lesson is created.
lessonEditor.freePreviewHint: When enabled, non-purchasers can watch this episode
lessonEditor.empty: No lessons yet. Click the button above to create one.
lessonEditor.addForCourse: Add a new lesson for course "{{title}}"

toast.confirmDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete lesson "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.

productDetail.shortDescHint: This is the product's main Description field (same as General Information). Rich text is supported here — use this editor instead of the plain text field above.
productDetail.longDescHint: Displayed below the product images as a full-width content section.

productVirtual.isVirtualHint: Enable this to deliver downloadable resources or virtual courses after purchase.
productVirtual.downloadUrlHint: Customers will see this download entry in order details after purchase.
productVirtual.courseHint: Saving will sync the course's linked product and generate the course access path for orders.

toast.loadFailed: Failed to load virtual product configuration
toast.saveFailed: Failed to save virtual product configuration

siteAnalytics.title: Website Logs
siteAnalytics.pageDescription: Query analytics logs and aggregate metrics, filter by time and country, and manually clean retained log data.
siteAnalytics.empty: No logs match the current filters.
siteAnalytics.emptyMetrics: No aggregate metrics are available for the current filters.
siteAnalytics.selectAll: Select all rows on this page
siteAnalytics.confirmDeleteDesc: Delete {{count}} log entries? Aggregate metrics will be recalculated from the retained dataset.
